name: Valla
description: A well-rounded Assassin that's mobile and can deal high sustained damage.
title: Demon Hunter
info: Valla witnessed the ferocity of hellspawn firsthand as the demons ravaged her village and left her for dead. Now, with no people to call her own, her only allegiance is to her cause: to rid Sanctuary of the demonic filth corrupting its lands.

Valla.name: Hungering Arrow
Valla.description: Fire an arrow that deals 140 (+4% per level) damage to the first target hit, then seeks up to 2 additional enemies, prioritizing Heroes, dealing 80 (+4% per level) damage. Can hit an enemy multiple times.

Valla.name: Multishot
Valla.description: Deal 159 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within the target area.

Valla.name: Vault
Valla.description: Dash to the target area. Valla's next Basic Attack within 2 seconds deals 6% increased damage per stack of Hatred.

Valla.name: Strafe
Valla.description: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 (+4% per level) damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.

Valla.name: Rain of Vengeance
Valla.description: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 (+4% per level) damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds.  Stores up to 2 charges.

Valla.name: Hatred
Valla.description: Basic Attacks grant a stack of Hatred, up to 10. Each Hatred stack increases Basic Attack damage by 8% and Movement Speed by 1%. Lasts 5 seconds.

1.name: Puncturing Arrow
1.description: Increase the number of Hungering Arrow bounces by 1.  Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Hungering Arrow refunds 40 Mana and permanently increases the damage of its initial impact by 6.

1.name: Fire At Will
1.description: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Multishot grants 2 Hatred and permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes with Multishot, increase its damage by 40.

1.name: Creed of the Hunter
1.description: Quest: Every 50 Basic Attacks against Heroes increases Hatred's damage bonus per stack by 1%, up to 6%.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus Attack Speed. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.

4.name: Arsenal
4.description: Increase the range of Multishot by 20%. Multishot also fires 3 grenades that deal 100 (+4% per level) damage and refund 25 Mana after hitting enemy Heroes.

4.name: Death Dealer
4.description: Increase Vaults Basic Attack damage bonus from 6% to 15% per stack of Hatred. If this attack kills its victim within 1.5 seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Vault by 5 seconds.

4.name: Repeating Arrow
4.description: Vault no longer has a Mana cost. Casting Vault resets the cooldown of Hungering Arrow.

7.name: Monster Hunter
7.description: Hungering Arrow deals 150% additional damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

7.name: Frost Shot
7.description: Multishot Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Hungering Arrows deals 25% more damage to Slowed enemies.

7.name: Hot Pursuit
7.description: Increase the Movement Speed bonus of each stack of Hatred from 1% to 2%.

10.name: Strafe
10.description: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 (+4% per level) damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.

10.name: Rain of Vengeance
10.description: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 (+4% per level) damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds.  Stores up to 2 charges.

13.name: Siphoning Arrows
13.description: Hitting a Hero with Hungering Arrow heals Valla for 4% of her maximum Health, and Multishot heals for 2%.

13.name: Tempered by Discipline
13.description: Basic Attacks heal for 10% of the damage dealt, increased by 2% per Hatred stack.

13.name: Gloom
13.description: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting 3 Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 15 Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for 1.2 (+4% per level) Health per second.

16.name: Punishment
16.description: While at max Hatred, Multishot's cooldown recharges 50% faster.  Passive: Reduce Multishot's Mana cost from 75 to 55.

16.name: Seething Hatred
16.description: While at max Hatred, increase all damage dealt by 10%.

16.name: Manticore
16.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same Hero deals an additional 4% of their maximum Health as damage.

20.name: Death Siphon
20.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Strafe increases its duration by 0.125 seconds. Strafe also fires penetrating bolts in a line for 34 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds.

20.name: Storm of Vengeance
20.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Rain of Vengeance by 5 seconds.  Passive: Each stack of Hatred increases your Attack Speed by 2%. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Attack Speed.

20.name: Acrobat
20.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Vault. Drop 3 Caltrops while Vaulting that deal 60 (+4% per level) damage and Slow enemies by 40% for 1 second.

20.name: Farflight Quiver
20.description: Gain 20% Basic Attack range. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Basic Attack range.

tooltipMarkup.DemonHunterCreedoftheHunter: Quest: Every Basic Attacks against Heroes increases Hatred's damage bonus per stack by %, up to 6%.Gambit: Gain % bonus Attack Speed. Every death reduces this bonus by %.

If this attack kills its victim within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DemonHunterVaultTalentDeathDealerDeathResponse,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Vault by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DemonHunterDeathDealer,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.

Each Hatred stack increases Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,DemonHunterHatredDamageAccumulator,Scale*100"player="0"/>%</c> and Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,DemonHunterHatredMovespeedAccumulator,Scale"player="0"/>%</c>. Can hit an enemy multiple times.

Hungering Arrows deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage to Slowed enemies.
